body.title: Observe-and-tune consult: review thresholds + triggers after 50 log entries
body.result: Trip condition met (wc -l consults.log = 309 ≥ 50). Memo shipped in lab/design_docs/consult_tuning_2026-04-23.md (commit 9f904ef0). Key findings from 104-session analysis: (1) confidence threshold 0.3 is too low — nothing under 0.62 observed, recommend raise to 0.55; (2) 24% test-fixture pollution from T-test/GOAL_123 — gate log behind IGOR_TEST_MODE; (3) 'pre-flight blocked (no recognizer)' trigger produces unactionable hypotheses — narrow with second signal; (4) 0/104 confab_flag events — wiring verify needed. Three follow-on tuning tickets recommended; actual tuning changes deferred per scope-out.
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
Go-live-when ticket: sits in the observe queue until ~/.TheIgors/local/logs/consults.log has accumulated 50 turns of consult transcripts (across all ConsultSessions). When trip condition fires, review: (a) confidence threshold (currently 0.3 — guess; tune from data), (b) call-site triggers in pe_chain and _process_network_msg (are they firing at the right moments?), (c) whether confab-scan flags correlate with bad hypotheses (is scanner catching the right things?). Output is either a follow-on ticket with tuned parameters or a writeup confirming current tuning is right.

**Trip condition:** wc -l ~/.TheIgors/local/logs/consults.log ≥ 50
**Notification:** via cc_inbox when D-cc-inbox-2026-04-23 ships

**Affected files:** (none on trip — this ticket only reads logs when it fires)
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not (no tests because: observe/review ticket, no code path to test)
**Scope boundary:** IN — read logs, review tuning, write findings. OUT — actual tuning changes (file separate follow-on if needed).
**Test plan:** no tests — this is a review task that fires once and produces human-readable output. The trip condition is auditable by tail+wc; review output is a short memo.
body.approved_plan: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.approval_notes: trip condition met; memo shipped in lab/design_docs/consult_tuning_2026-04-23.md
